title: CI owns test-all: red run auto-files a deduped verify-red issue
action: Per CONTEXT D2 + plan-check P1-1/P3. scripts/ci_verify_issue.mjs: pure decision core — buildIssueTitle(workflow, branch), buildIssueBody(failTail, runUrl, sha), decideAction(openIssues) => {create}|{comment,issueNumber} — gh invocations behind an injectable exec. CLI mode reads env (GITHUB_WORKFLOW, GITHUB_REF_NAME, GITHUB_SHA, GITHUB_RUN_URL or constructed, VERIFY_TAIL_FILE). ci.yml: permissions issues: write; capture verify output to a file for the tail; failure step gated to BOTH github.event_name == 'push' AND one matrix leg only (node 20) — fork PRs have read-only tokens and fail-fast:false would triple-create (P3); registry freshness step (node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check) on the green path; existing verify_all.mjs step untouched; verify-red label created if missing (tolerate exists-error). P1-1: this cell adds a new discovered suite — finish with node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --write and commit the refreshed registry. Test scripts/test_ci_verify_issue.mjs: title/body determinism, dedupe decision, label constant, injected-exec call shapes. No network in tests.

truths: failure step never runs on green; green path gains registry --check
dedupe: open verify-red issue => comment, never duplicate
pure core tested offline, gh behind injected exec

trace.outcome: CI owns test-all: ci.yml files/dedupes verify-red issues on push failures (single matrix leg, issues:write scoped, tail attached), registry freshness on green path; 14-check offline test green
